summary: Mobile PWA Phase 3 testing completed successfully. All premium UI components, mobile dashboard, mobile wallet, and animations verified working correctly.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps with navigation items - may cause click interception issues (inherited from Phase 1-2)

passed_tests: Mobile Dashboard shows premium balance card with gradient (from-primary via-emerald-700 to-emerald-800)
Mobile Dashboard shows stats grid with 2 items: Portfolio balance ($0.00) and Expected profit (+$8,150.00)
Mobile Dashboard shows profit chart with real data (Sep-Jan, Total profit: +$476.30)
Mobile Dashboard shows contracts list (4 MobileContractCard components)
Mobile Dashboard shows transactions list (8 MobileTransactionItem components)
Mobile Dashboard has PullToRefresh component wrapper
Mobile Wallet shows two balance cards: Available balance and Portfolio balance
Mobile Wallet tabs switch between deposits (1) and withdrawals (0)
Mobile Wallet deposit modal opens with slide-up animation (animate-slide-up class)
Mobile Wallet deposit modal shows account number (AC76743631) and bank info (Народный банк Казахстана)
Mobile Wallet withdraw modal opens correctly with slide-up animation
Mobile Wallet withdraw modal shows currency selector, amount input, broker selector, and broker account input
Desktop Dashboard renders correctly on large screens (>768px) with data-testid='dashboard-page'
Desktop Dashboard shows 3 balance cards: available-balance-card, portfolio-balance-card, expected-profit-card
Desktop Wallet renders correctly on large screens with data-testid='wallet-page'
Mobile components hidden on desktop (mobile-dashboard, mobile-wallet not visible)
Desktop components hidden on mobile (dashboard-page, wallet-page not visible)
MobileBalanceCard component renders with gradient variants (primary, gold, secondary, success)
MobileStatItem component renders with icon, label, value, and optional trend indicator
MobileContractCard component renders with contract ID, portfolio name, amount, expected return, progress bar, and download button
MobileTransactionItem component renders with type, amount, date, status, and income/expense indicator
MobileSectionHeader component renders with title and optional action button
MobileSkeleton component renders loading states for balance, card, and list variants
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile PWA Phase 3 implementation verified. Premium UI components (MobileBalanceCard, MobileStatItem, MobileContractCard, MobileTransactionItem, MobileSectionHeader, MobileSkeleton) all working. Slide-up animation for modals uses 'animate-slide-up' CSS class. PullToRefresh component wraps mobile pages. useIsMobile() hook controls mobile/desktop rendering at 768px breakpoint. Use ':visible' selector for forms due to duplicate DOM elements. Mobile viewport tested at 390x844, desktop at 1920x800.

features: Deposit modal shows account number and bank info
Withdraw modal shows broker selector and account input
